title: compression
description: Mod that let's players craft compressed blocks to free inventory space
body:
Compression is a mod that allows players craft compressed variants of blocks using 8 less compressed blocks (8 cobblestone make one compressed cobblestone, 8 compressed cobblestone make double compressed cobblestone and so on)

Current list of compressible blocks:
- Cobbled stone,
- Cobbled basalt,
- Cobbled limestone,
- Cobbled granite,
- Cobbled permafrost,
- Cobbled netherrack,
- Gravel,
- Sand,
- Dirt
